subject: Physics
title: Chasing a Beam of Light
description: A 60-second lesson on Chasing a Beam of Light.

hook.text: At age 16, Einstein imagined running alongside a beam of light. The thought haunted him for years.

buildup.text: If you matched light's speed, would the wave freeze in place? Maxwell's equations said no.

discovery.text: Einstein realized nobody can ever catch a light beam. The speed of light is an absolute limit.

twist.text: This teenage daydream became the foundation of special relativity ten years later.

climax.text: The greatest physics revolution started not in a lab but in a teenager's imagination.

punchline.text: A boy chases light. Ten years later, he rewrites physics.

quiz.question: What did young Einstein's thought experiment about chasing light eventually lead to?
